results.notes: Uses PyTorch/rocBLAS GEMM with static candidate embeddings pre-normalized outside online latency.
Uses PyTorch/rocBLAS GEMM with static candidate embeddings pre-normalized outside online latency.
Uses PyTorch/rocBLAS GEMM with static candidate embeddings pre-normalized outside online latency.
rocBLAS GEMM plus a custom Triton kernel for telemetry penalty and score combine; top-k remains PyTorch.
rocBLAS GEMM plus a custom Triton kernel for telemetry penalty and score combine; top-k remains PyTorch.
rocBLAS GEMM plus a custom Triton kernel for telemetry penalty and score combine; top-k remains PyTorch.
Uses torch._scaled_mm with float8_e4m3fnuz for the similarity GEMM; quantization and non-GEMM rerank work are included.
torch.compile/Inductor over the eager PyTorch graph.
torch.compile/Inductor over the eager PyTorch graph.
torch.compile/Inductor over the eager PyTorch graph.
Measured in an isolated subprocess because ROCm graph capture reserves a private memory pool.
Measured in an isolated subprocess because ROCm graph capture reserves a private memory pool.
Measured in an isolated subprocess because ROCm graph capture reserves a private memory pool.

AITER is installed, but no exposed operator implements normalize + similarity + telemetry penalty + weighted rerank + top-k. A separate hipb_mm probe segfaulted on this image, so it was not used in the benchmark.

Composable Kernel Python bindings are not importable as ck or composable_kernel in this image. Enabling this would require CK development headers/examples or a purpose-built CK extension for this workload.
